item.title: 2023 Kawasaki Ninja® 650 Base EX650R
item.description:
Used 2023 Kawasaki Ninja 650 motorcycle for sale in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio with 7,151 Miles. This pre-owned Kawasaki EX650RPF is factory original from Kawasaki.

State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. We are located in Cuyahoga Falls just outside Akron, Ohio and a short ride from Cleveland.

Are you from out of town? Don’t worry, we work with out of state riders all the time. We recommend HaulBikes for their professionalism and care. Schedule and rates vary. To get started visit Haulbikes.com for your delivery quote. Engine Type: Parallel Twin
Displacement: 39.6 cu. in. (649 cc)
Bore and Stroke: Bore: 3.3 in. (83 mm); Stroke: 2.4 in. (60 mm)
Cooling: Liquid
Compression Ratio: 10.8:1
Fuel System: Gas
Transmission: Manual
Front Suspension: Telescopic Fork
Rear Suspension: Twin Sided Swing Arm
Front Brakes: Dual Hydraulic Disc
Rear Brakes: Hydraulic Disc
Front Tire: Dunlop® Sportmax Roadsport 2: 120/70ZR17 M/C 58W

item.title: 2021 Yamaha YZF-R3 Monster Energy
item.description:
Used 2021 Yamaha YZF-R3 Monster Edition motorcycle for sale in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio with 7,969 Miles. This pre-owned Yamaha YZF-R3 offers K.O. Lightning exhaust, fender eliminator kit, custom LED rear turn signals, tank protectors. State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. We are located in Cuyahoga Falls just outside Akron, Ohio and a short ride from Cleveland. Are you from out of town? Don’t worry, we work with out of state riders all the time. We recommend HaulBikes for their professionalism and care. Schedule and rates vary. To get started visit Haulbikes.com for your delivery quote. Engine Type: 4-stroke, DOHC inline twin-cylinder; 4-valves per cylinder
Displacement: 321cc
Bore and Stroke: 68.0mm x 44.1mm
Cooling: Liquid
Compression Ratio: 11.2:1
Fuel System: Fuel injection
Transmission: 6-speed; multiplate wet clutch
Final Drive: Chain
Front Suspension: Inverted telescopic fork; 5.1 in. travel
Rear Suspension: Monocross single shock, adjustable preload; 4.9- in. travel
Front Brakes: 298mm hydraulic disc with ABS
Rear Brakes: 220mm hydraulic disc with ABS
Front Tire: 110/70-17 Dunlop® Sportmax GPR-300®
Rear Tire: 140/70-17 Dunlop® Sportmax GPR-300®
Wheelbase: 54.3 in.
Seat Height: 30.7 in.
Rake: 25.0 deg.
Trail: 3.7 in.
Fuel Capacity: 3.7 gal.
MPG: 56 mpg
Dry Weight: Curb Weight: 375 lb.

Used 2022 Yamaha YZF-R3 ABS motorcycle for sale in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio with 4,288 Miles. This pre-owned Yamaha YZFR3ANW is factory original from Yamaha. State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. We are located in Cuyahoga Falls just outside Akron, Ohio and a short ride from Cleveland. Are you from out of town? Don’t worry, we work with out of state riders all the time. We recommend HaulBikes for their professionalism and care. Schedule and rates vary. To get started visit Haulbikes.com for your delivery quote. Displacement: 321cc

Cooling: Liquid
Compression Ratio: 11.2:1
Fuel System: Fuel injection
Transmission: 6-speed; multiplate wet clutch
Final Drive: Chain
Front Suspension: Inverted telescopic fork; 5.1 in. travel
Rear Suspension: Monocross single shock, adjustable preload; 4.9- in. travel
Front Brakes: 298mm hydraulic disc with ABS
Rear Brakes: 220mm hydraulic disc with ABS

Rear Tire: 140/70-17 Dunlop® Sportmax GPR-300R

item.title: 2006 Harley-Davidson® SPORTSTER 883 CUSTOM XL883C
item.description:
Used 2006 Harley Davidson Sportster 883 Custom motorcycle for sale in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio with 13,841 Miles. This pre-owned H.D. XL883C offers Rinehart exhaust, quick release passenger backrest, engine guards, leather tank protector, custom matching grips and foot pegs, custom derby covers.

State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. We are located in Cuyahoga Falls just outside Akron, Ohio and a short ride from Cleveland.

Are you from out of town? Don’t worry, we work with out of state riders all the time. We recommend HaulBikes for their professionalism and care. Schedule and rates vary. To get started visit Haulbikes.com for your delivery quote.

Used 2023 Honda Rebel 100T DCT motorcycle for sale in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio with 2,525 Miles. This pre-owned Honda CMX1100TDP offers factory hard saddlebags, engine guards, rider floorboards. State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. We are located in Cuyahoga Falls just outside Akron, Ohio and a short ride from Cleveland. Are you from out of town? Don’t worry, we work with out of state riders all the time.
